nasb.text: For evils beyond number have surrounded me; My iniquities have overtaken me, so that I am not able to see; They are more numerous than the hairs of my head, And my heart has failed me.

esv.text: For evils have encompassed me beyond number; my iniquities have overtaken me, and I cannot see; they are more than the hairs of my head; my heart fails me.

cnv.text: 因有無數的禍患圍繞著我； 我的罪孽追上了我，使我不能看見； 它們比我的頭髮還多， 以致我心驚膽戰。

ccb.text: 我患难重重，罪恶缠身， 看不到出路。 我的罪过比我的头发还多， 我心惊胆战。

csbs.text: 因为缠绕我的恶事多得无法数算， 我的罪孽追上我，以致我不能够看见； 它们比我的头发更多， 我的勇气也离弃了我。
